Após SUBSTITUIR TODO O CONTEÚDO do arquivo app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml por este código, por favor, reenvie o conteúdo completo das classes P2PSendReceiveThread.java e TcpSendReceiveThread.java para garantir que você tenha as versões mais recentes e corretas.
Conteúdo completo para P2PSendReceiveThread.java:
Java
package com.example.meshwave;

import android.os.Handler;
import android.os.Message;
import android.util.Log;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.PrintWriter;
import java.net.Socket;

public class P2PSendReceiveThread extends Thread {

    private static final String TAG = "P2PSendReceiveThread";
    private Handler handler;
    private Socket socket;
    private BufferedReader bufferedReader;
    private PrintWriter printWriter;
    private boolean isConnected = false;

    public P2PSendReceiveThread(Handler handler) {
        this.handler = handler;
    }

    // For client side (initiating connection)
    public void connect(final String peerAddress, final int port) {
        new Thread(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    // Simulate P2P connection for prototype
                    // In a real scenario, this would involve Wi-Fi Direct or Bluetooth LE APIs
                    socket = new Socket(peerAddress, port);
                    bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
                    printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
                    isConnected = true;
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Conectado a: " + peerAddress).sendToTarget();
                    Log.d(TAG, "P2P Connected to: " + peerAddress);

                    String message;
                    while ((message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                        handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                        Log.d(TAG, "P2P Received: " + message);
                    }
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    Log.e(TAG, "P2P Connection Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro de Conexão: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
                    isConnected = false;
                }
            }
        }).start();
    }

    // For server side (accepting connection)
    public void setSocket(Socket socket) {
        this.socket = socket;
        try {
            bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
            printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
            isConnected = true;
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Conexão Aceita.").sendToTarget();
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Connection Accepted.");
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Socket Setup Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro ao configurar Socket: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {
        if (printWriter != null && isConnected) {
            String message = new String(bytes);
            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "P2P Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void disconnect() {
        try {
            if (socket != null) {
                socket.close();
            }
            if (bufferedReader != null) {
                bufferedReader.close();
            }
            if (printWriter != null) {
                printWriter.close();
            }
            isConnected = false;
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Disconnected.");
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Desconectado.").sendToTarget();
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Error during disconnect: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro ao desconectar: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}
Conteúdo completo para TcpSendReceiveThread.java:

package com.example.meshwave;

import android.os.Handler;
import android.util.Log;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.PrintWriter;
import java.net.Socket;

public class TcpSendReceiveThread extends Thread {

    private static final String TAG = "TcpSendReceiveThread";
    private Handler handler;
    private Socket socket;
    private BufferedReader bufferedReader;
    private PrintWriter printWriter;
    private boolean isConnected = false;

    public TcpSendReceiveThread(Handler handler) {
        this.handler = handler;
    }

    public void connect(final String serverAddress, final int port) {
        new Thread(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    socket = new Socket(serverAddress, port);
                    bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
                    printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
                    isConnected = true;
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conectado a: " + serverAddress).sendToTarget();
                    Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connected to: " + serverAddress);

                    String message;
                    while ((message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                        handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                        Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
                    }
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    Log.e(TAG, "TCP Connection Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Conexão: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
                    isConnected = false;
                }
            }
        }).start();
    }

    public void setSocket(Socket socket) {
        this.socket = socket;
        try {
            bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
            printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
            isConnected = true;
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conexão Aceita.").sendToTarget();
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connection Accepted.");
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Socket Setup Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro ao configurar Socket: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {
        if (printWriter != null && isConnected) {
            String message = new String(bytes);
            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}

opção Rebuild não existe
Lite
Mil desculpas pela confusão! Você está absolutamente correto. A opção "Rebuild Project" geralmente está localizada no menu "Build" do Android Studio. Às vezes, a terminologia pode variar ligeiramente ou a interface pode ser um pouco diferente dependendo da versão do Android Studio.
Por favor, tente encontrar a opção "Rebuild Project" seguindo este caminho:
No Android Studio, vá em Build (no menu superior) > Rebuild Project
Se você não encontrar "Rebuild Project" lá, procure por "Make Project" ou "Rebuild Module 'app'". O objetivo é forçar uma recompilação completa do projeto.
Além disso, para garantir que estamos no mesmo ponto e que todos os erros anteriores sejam resolvidos, por favor, confirme que você substituiu TODO o conteúdo dos seguintes arquivos pelos códigos completos que eu forneci nas mensagens anteriores:
app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml
app/src/main/java/com/example/meshwave/MainActivity.java
app/src/main/java/com/example/meshwave/P2PSendReceiveThread.java
app/src/main/java/com/example/meshwave/TcpSendReceiveThread.java
app/src/main/java/com/example/meshwave/WiFiDirectBroadcastReceiver.java (se você precisou criá-lo)
É CRUCIAL que o conteúdo seja totalmente substituído para evitar problemas de código antigo ou duplicado.
Após garantir que todos esses arquivos estão com o conteúdo correto e que você executou a opção de recompilação, siga os passos:
Sincronize o Projeto com os Arquivos Gradle: No Android Studio, vá em File > Sync Project with Gradle Files.
Limpe o Projeto: Vá em Build > Clean Project.
Reconstrua o Projeto: Vá em Build > Rebuild Project (ou a opção equivalente que você encontrar).
Execute o Aplicativo: Conecte um dispositivo Android ou inicie um emulador e execute o aplicativo.
Me informe se a compilação for bem-sucedida e se você conseguir testar a comunicação.

Manus 1.6 Lite
Resource Not Found Error in Android Build Process
Entrar
Lite
Obrigado por me enviar a linha. Isso confirma o problema: o método log ainda está definido como private no seu MainActivity.java.
Para resolver isso de uma vez por todas, é absolutamente crucial que você substitua TODO o conteúdo do seu arquivo MainActivity.java pelo código completo que estou fornecendo abaixo. Preste atenção especial à linha do método log, que agora está public.
Conteúdo completo para MainActivity.java (com o método log como public):
Java
package com.example.meshwave;

import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
import androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity;
import androidx.core.app.ActivityCompat;
import androidx.core.content.ContextCompat;

import android.Manifest;
import android.annotation.SuppressLint;
import android.content.BroadcastReceiver;
import android.content.Context;
import android.content.IntentFilter;
import android.content.pm.PackageManager;
import android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pConfig;
import android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pDevice;
import android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pDeviceList;
import android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pInfo;
import android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pManager;
import android.os.Bundle;
import android.os.Handler;
import android.os.Looper;
import android.os.Message; // Import Message
import android.util.Log; // Import Log
import android.widget.RadioButton;
import android.widget.RadioGroup;
import android.widget.ScrollView;
import android.widget.TextView;
import android.widget.Button;
import android.widget.EditText;
import android.widget.Toast;

import java.io.IOException;
import java.net.InetAddress;
import java.net.InetSocketAddress;
import java.net.ServerSocket;
import java.net.Socket;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;

public class MainActivity extends AppCompatActivity implements WifiP2pManager.ConnectionInfoListener, WifiP2pManager.PeerListListener {

    // UI Elements
    private TextView logTextView;
    private ScrollView logScrollView;
    private RadioGroup nodeRoleRadioGroup;
    private EditText peerGatewayIpEditText;
    private Button setRoleButton;
    private Button discoverPeersButton;
    private EditText recipientIdEditText;
    private EditText messageEditText;
    private Button sendButton;

    // Wi-Fi P2P related
    private WifiP2pManager manager;
    private WifiP2pManager.Channel channel;
    private BroadcastReceiver receiver;
    private IntentFilter intentFilter;
    private List<WifiP2pDevice> peers = new ArrayList<>();

    // Communication Threads
    private P2PSendReceiveThread p2pSendReceiveThread;
    private TcpSendReceiveThread tcpSendReceiveThread;

    // Node Roles
    private enum NodeRole { NODE_A, NODE_X, NODE_Y, NODE_Z, NODE_B }
    private NodeRole currentNodeRole = NodeRole.NODE_A; // Default role

    // Node IDs (for routing simulation)
    private static final String nodeA_ID = "NODE_A";
    private static final String nodeX_ID = "NODE_X";
    private static final String nodeY_ID = "NODE_Y";
    private static final String nodeZ_ID = "NODE_Z";
    private static final String nodeB_ID = "NODE_B";

    // Message types for Handler
    public static final int MESSAGE_READ = 1;
    public static final int MESSAGE_TOAST = 2;

    // Handler for updating UI from communication threads
    private Handler handler = new Handler(Looper.getMainLooper()) {
        @Override
        public void handleMessage(@NonNull Message msg) {
            switch (msg.what) {
                case MESSAGE_READ:
                    byte[] readBuf = (byte[]) msg.obj;
                    String readMessage = new String(readBuf, 0, msg.arg1);
                    log("Received: " + readMessage);
                    break;
                case MESSAGE_TOAST:
                    Toast.makeText(MainActivity.this, msg.obj.toString(), Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show();
                    break;
            }
        }
    };

    @Override
    protected void onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState) {
        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState);
        setContentView(R.layout.activity_main);

        // Initialize UI elements
        logTextView = findViewById(R.id.logTextView);
        logScrollView = findViewById(R.id.logScrollView);
        nodeRoleRadioGroup = findViewById(R.id.nodeRoleRadioGroup);
        peerGatewayIpEditText = findViewById(R.id.peerGatewayIpEditText);
        setRoleButton = findViewById(R.id.setRoleButton);
        discoverPeersButton = findViewById(R.id.discoverPeersButton);
        recipientIdEditText = findViewById(R.id.recipientIdEditText);
        messageEditText = findViewById(R.id.messageEditText);
        sendButton = findViewById(R.id.sendButton);

        // Initialize Wi-Fi P2P
        manager = (WifiP2pManager) getSystemService(Context.WIFI_P2P_SERVICE);
        channel = manager.initialize(this, getMainLooper(), null);
        receiver = new WiFiDirectBroadcastReceiver(manager, channel, this);

        intentFilter = new IntentFilter();
        intentFilter.addAction(WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_STATE_CHANGED_ACTION);
        intentFilter.addAction(WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_PEERS_CHANGED_ACTION);
        intentFilter.addAction(WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_CONNECTION_CHANGED_ACTION);
        intentFilter.addAction(WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_THIS_DEVICE_CHANGED_ACTION);

        // Request permissions
        checkAndRequestPermissions();

        // Set up listeners
        setRoleButton.setOnClickListener(v -> setNodeRole());
        discoverPeersButton.setOnClickListener(v -> discoverPeers());
        sendButton.setOnClickListener(v -> sendMessage());

        // Initialize communication threads (they will be started/connected based on role)
        p2pSendReceiveThread = new P2PSendReceiveThread(handler);
        tcpSendReceiveThread = new TcpSendReceiveThread(handler);

        // Initial log
        log("MeshWave App Started.");
    }

    private void checkAndRequestPermissions() {
        String[] permissions = {
                Manifest.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION,
                Manifest.permission.ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION,
                Manifest.permission.ACCESS_WIFI_STATE,
                Manifest.permission.CHANGE_WIFI_STATE,
                Manifest.permission.INTERNET,
                Manifest.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE,
                Manifest.permission.CHANGE_NETWORK_STATE
        };

        List<String> permissionsToRequest = new ArrayList<>();
        for (String permission : permissions) {
            if (ContextCompat.checkSelfPermission(this, permission) != PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED) {
                permissionsToRequest.add(permission);
            }
        }

        if (!permissionsToRequest.isEmpty()) {
            ActivityCompat.requestPermissions(this, permissionsToRequest.toArray(new String[0]), 1);
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void onRequestPermissionsResult(int requestCode, @NonNull String[] permissions, @NonNull int[] grantResults) {
        super.onRequestPermissionsResult(requestCode, permissions, grantResults);
        if (requestCode == 1) {
            for (int i = 0; i < permissions.length; i++) {
                if (grantResults[i] == PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED) {
                    log(permissions[i] + " granted.");
                } else {
                    log(permissions[i] + " denied.");
                }
            }
        }
    }

    @Override
    protected void onResume() {
        super.onResume();
        registerReceiver(receiver, intentFilter);
    }

    @Override
    protected void onPause() {
        super.onPause();
        unregisterReceiver(receiver);
    }

    private void setNodeRole() {
        int selectedId = nodeRoleRadioGroup.getCheckedRadioButtonId();
        RadioButton selectedRadioButton = findViewById(selectedId);
        if (selectedRadioButton != null) {
            String role = selectedRadioButton.getText().toString();
            switch (role) {
                case "Node A": currentNodeRole = NodeRole.NODE_A; break;
                case "Node X": currentNodeRole = NodeRole.NODE_X; break;
                case "Node Y": currentNodeRole = NodeRole.NODE_Y; break;
                case "Node Z": currentNodeRole = NodeRole.NODE_Z; break;
                case "Node B": currentNodeRole = NodeRole.NODE_B; break;
            }
            log("Node role set to: " + currentNodeRole.name());

            // Start server threads based on role
            if (currentNodeRole == NodeRole.NODE_Y || currentNodeRole == NodeRole.NODE_Z) {
                // These nodes act as gateways, so they should listen for TCP connections
                // For simplicity in prototype, we'll assume a fixed port
                new Thread(() -> {
                    try {
                        ServerSocket serverSocket = new ServerSocket(8888);
                        log("Listening for TCP connections on port 8888...");
                        Socket socket = serverSocket.accept();
                        log("TCP connection established with: " + socket.getInetAddress().getHostAddress());
                        tcpSendReceiveThread.setSocket(socket);
                        tcpSendReceiveThread.start();
                    } catch (IOException e) {
                        log("TCP Server Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    }
                }).start();
            }
        }
    }

    private void discoverPeers() {
        if (manager != null && channel != null) {
            manager.discoverPeers(channel, new WifiP2pManager.ActionListener() {
                @Override
                public void onSuccess() {
                    log("Peer discovery initiated.");
                }

                @Override
                public void onFailure(int reasonCode) {
                    log("Peer discovery failed: " + reasonCode);
                }
            });
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void onPeersAvailable(WifiP2pDeviceList peerList) {
        peers.clear();
        peers.addAll(peerList.getDeviceList());
        log("Peers discovered: " + peers.size());
        for (WifiP2pDevice device : peers) {
            log("  - " + device.deviceName + " (" + device.deviceAddress + ")");
        }

        // For prototype, connect to the first available peer if we are Node A or B
        if ((currentNodeRole == NodeRole.NODE_A || currentNodeRole == NodeRole.NODE_B) && !peers.isEmpty()) {
            WifiP2pDevice device = peers.get(0);
            WifiP2pConfig config = new WifiP2pConfig();
            config.deviceAddress = device.deviceAddress;

            manager.connect(channel, config, new WifiP2pManager.ActionListener() {
                @Override
                public void onSuccess() {
                    log("Connecting to peer: " + device.deviceName);
                }

                @Override
                public void onFailure(int reasonCode) {
                    log("Failed to connect to peer: " + reasonCode);
                }
            });
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void onConnectionInfoAvailable(WifiP2pInfo info) {
        log("Connection info available. Group Formed: " + info.groupFormed);
        if (info.groupFormed) {
            if (info.isGroupOwner) {
                log("I am the Group Owner.");
                // Group owner acts as a server for P2P connections
                new Thread(() -> {
                    try {
                        ServerSocket serverSocket = new ServerSocket(8888);
                        log("Listening for P2P connections on port 8888...");
                        Socket socket = serverSocket.accept();
                        log("P2P connection established with: " + socket.getInetAddress().getHostAddress());
                        p2pSendReceiveThread.setSocket(socket);
                        p2pSendReceiveThread.start();
                    } catch (IOException e) {
                        log("P2P Server Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    }
                }).start();
            } else {
                log("I am a client. Group Owner Address: " + info.groupOwnerAddress.getHostAddress());
                // Client connects to group owner for P2P communication
                p2pSendReceiveThread.connect(info.groupOwnerAddress.getHostAddress(), 8888);
            }
        }
    }

    private void sendMessage() {
        String recipientId = recipientIdEditText.getText().toString().trim();
        String messageContent = messageEditText.getText().toString().trim();

        if (recipientId.isEmpty() || messageContent.isEmpty()) {
            log("Recipient ID and Message cannot be empty.");
            return;
        }

        String fullMessage = getCurrentNodeId() + ":" + recipientId + ":" + messageContent;
        log("Attempting to send: " + fullMessage);

        // Simplified routing logic based on the provided table
        switch (getCurrentNodeId()) {
            case nodeA_ID:
                if (recipientId.equals(nodeY_ID)) {
                    if (p2pSendReceiveThread != null && p2pSendReceiveThread.isConnected()) {
                        p2pSendReceiveThread.send(fullMessage.getBytes());
                    } else {
                        log("P2P connection to Y not established.");
                    }
                } else if (recipientId.equals(nodeZ_ID) || recipientId.equals(nodeB_ID)) {
                    // Route A -> Y (P2P) -> Z (TCP) -> B (P2P)
                    // For prototype, we'll just log the intent to send via Y
                    log("Routing via Y for Z/B. (P2P to Y, then Y to Z/B via TCP/P2P)");
                    if (p2pSendReceiveThread != null && p2pSendReceiveThread.isConnected()) {
                        p2pSendReceiveThread.send(fullMessage.getBytes());
                    } else {
                        log("P2P connection to Y not established for routing.");
                    }
                } else {
                    log("Invalid recipient for Node A.");
                }
                break;
            case nodeX_ID:
                // Node X can only talk to Node Y via P2P in this simplified setup
                if (recipientId.equals(nodeY_ID)) {
                    if (p2pSendReceiveThread != null && p2pSendReceiveThread.isConnected()) {
                        p2pSendReceiveThread.send(fullMessage.getBytes());
                    } else {
                        log("P2P connection to Y not established.");
                    }
                } else {
                    log("Invalid recipient for Node X.");
                }
                break;
            case nodeY_ID:
                if (recipientId.equals(nodeA_ID) || recipientId.equals(nodeX_ID)) {
                    if (p2pSendReceiveThread != null && p2pSendReceiveThread.isConnected()) {
                        p2pSendReceiveThread.send(fullMessage.getBytes());
                    } else {
                        log("P2P connection to A/X not established.");
                    }
                } else if (recipientId.equals(nodeZ_ID) || recipientId.equals(nodeB_ID)) {
                    // Route Y -> Z (TCP)
                    if (tcpSendReceiveThread != null && tcpSendReceiveThread.isConnected()) {
                        tcpSendReceiveThread.send(fullMessage.getBytes());
                    } else {
                        log("TCP connection to Z not established.");
                    }
                } else {
                    log("Invalid recipient for Node Y.");
                }
                break;
            case nodeZ_ID:
                if (recipientId.equals(nodeB_ID)) {
                    if (p2pSendReceiveThread != null && p2pSendReceiveThread.isConnected()) {
                        p2pSendReceiveThread.send(fullMessage.getBytes());
                    } else {
                        log("P2P connection to B not established.");
                    }
                } else if (recipientId.equals(nodeY_ID) || recipientId.equals(nodeA_ID) || recipientId.equals(nodeX_ID)) {
                    // Route Z -> Y (TCP)
                    if (tcpSendReceiveThread != null && tcpSendReceiveThread.isConnected()) {
                        tcpSendReceiveThread.send(fullMessage.getBytes());
                    } else {
                        log("TCP connection to Y not established.");
                    }
                } else {
                    log("Invalid recipient for Node Z.");
                }
                break;
            case nodeB_ID:
                if (recipientId.equals(nodeZ_ID)) {
                    if (p2pSendReceiveThread != null && p2pSendReceiveThread.isConnected()) {
                        p2pSendReceiveThread.send(fullMessage.getBytes());
                    } else {
                        log("P2P connection to Z not established.");
                    }
                } else if (recipientId.equals(nodeY_ID) || recipientId.equals(nodeA_ID) || recipientId.equals(nodeX_ID)) {
                    // Route B -> Z (P2P) -> Y (TCP) -> A/X (P2P)
                    // For prototype, we'll just log the intent to send via Z
                    log("Routing via Z for Y/A/X. (P2P to Z, then Z to Y/A/X via TCP/P2P)");
                    if (p2pSendReceiveThread != null && p2pSendReceiveThread.isConnected()) {
                        p2pSendReceiveThread.send(fullMessage.getBytes());
                    } else {
                        log("P2P connection to Z not established for routing.");
                    }
                } else {
                    log("Invalid recipient for Node B.");
                }
                break;
            default:
                log("Unknown node role.");
                break;
        }
    }

    // --- Utility Method ---
    public void log(String message) { // Changed to public
        runOnUiThread(() -> {
            logTextView.append(message + "\n");
            logScrollView.post(() -> logScrollView.fullScroll(ScrollView.FOCUS_DOWN));
        });
    }

    private String getCurrentNodeId() {
        switch (currentNodeRole) {
            case NODE_A: return nodeA_ID;
            case NODE_X: return nodeX_ID;
            case NODE_Y: return nodeY_ID;
            case NODE_Z: return nodeZ_ID;
            case NODE_B: return nodeB_ID;
            default: return "UNKNOWN";
        }
    }

    @Override
    protected void onDestroy() {
        super.onDestroy();
        // Disconnect P2P and TCP threads if they are running
        if (p2pSendReceiveThread != null) {
            p2pSendReceiveThread.cancel();
        }
        if (tcpSendReceiveThread != null) {
            tcpSendReceiveThread.cancel();
        }
    }
}

Lite
Obrigado pela nova captura de tela. Entendi os novos erros. Os erros "cannot find symbol variable" para elementos como nodeRoleRadioGroup, peerGatewayIpEditText, etc., indicam que o Android Studio não está conseguindo encontrar as referências para esses IDs no seu arquivo de layout (activity_main.xml).
Isso geralmente acontece quando o arquivo activity_main.xml está ausente, incorreto ou não está sendo processado corretamente. Além disso, o erro "no suitable constructor found for TcpSendReceiveThread" e "cannot find symbol method setSocket(Socket)" sugere que as classes P2PSendReceiveThread e TcpSendReceiveThread ainda não estão sendo reconhecidas corretamente ou que as versões que você tem não são as mais recentes.
Para resolver isso, faremos o seguinte:
Vou fornecer o conteúdo completo do arquivo activity_main.xml. Você precisará substituir todo o conteúdo do seu arquivo app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml por este código.
Vou reenviar o conteúdo completo das classes P2PSendReceiveThread.java e TcpSendReceiveThread.java para garantir que você tenha as versões mais recentes e corretas.
Por favor, comece substituindo o conteúdo do seu activity_main.xml.

Após SUBSTITUIR TODO O CONTEÚDO do arquivo app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml por este código, por favor, reenvie o conteúdo completo das classes P2PSendReceiveThread.java e TcpSendReceiveThread.java para garantir que você tenha as versões mais recentes e corretas.
Conteúdo completo para P2PSendReceiveThread.java:
Java
package com.example.meshwave;

import android.os.Handler;
import android.os.Message;
import android.util.Log;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.PrintWriter;
import java.net.Socket;

public class P2PSendReceiveThread extends Thread {

    private static final String TAG = "P2PSendReceiveThread";
    private Handler handler;
    private Socket socket;
    private BufferedReader bufferedReader;
    private PrintWriter printWriter;
    private boolean isConnected = false;

    public P2PSendReceiveThread(Handler handler) {
        this.handler = handler;
    }

    // For client side (initiating connection)
    public void connect(final String peerAddress, final int port) {
        new Thread(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    // Simulate P2P connection for prototype
                    // In a real scenario, this would involve Wi-Fi Direct or Bluetooth LE APIs
                    socket = new Socket(peerAddress, port);
                    bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
                    printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
                    isConnected = true;
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Conectado a: " + peerAddress).sendToTarget();
                    Log.d(TAG, "P2P Connected to: " + peerAddress);

                    String message;
                    while ((message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                        handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                        Log.d(TAG, "P2P Received: " + message);
                    }
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    Log.e(TAG, "P2P Connection Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro de Conexão: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
                    isConnected = false;
                }
            }
        }).start();
    }

    // For server side (accepting connection)
    public void setSocket(Socket socket) {
        this.socket = socket;
        try {
            bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
            printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
            isConnected = true;
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Conexão Aceita.").sendToTarget();
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Connection Accepted.");
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Socket Setup Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro ao configurar Socket: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {
        if (printWriter != null && isConnected) {
            String message = new String(bytes);
            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "P2P Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void disconnect() {
        try {
            if (socket != null) {
                socket.close();
            }
            if (bufferedReader != null) {
                bufferedReader.close();
            }
            if (printWriter != null) {
                printWriter.close();
            }
            isConnected = false;
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Disconnected.");
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Desconectado.").sendToTarget();
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Error during disconnect: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro ao desconectar: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}
Conteúdo completo para TcpSendReceiveThread.java:
Java
package com.example.meshwave;

import android.os.Handler;
import android.util.Log;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.PrintWriter;
import java.net.Socket;

public class TcpSendReceiveThread extends Thread {

    private static final String TAG = "TcpSendReceiveThread";
    private Handler handler;
    private Socket socket;
    private BufferedReader bufferedReader;
    private PrintWriter printWriter;
    private boolean isConnected = false;

    public TcpSendReceiveThread(Handler handler) {
        this.handler = handler;
    }

    public void connect(final String serverAddress, final int port) {
        new Thread(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    socket = new Socket(serverAddress, port);
                    bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
                    printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
                    isConnected = true;
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conectado a: " + serverAddress).sendToTarget();
                    Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connected to: " + serverAddress);

                    String message;
                    while ((message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                        handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                        Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
                    }
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    Log.e(TAG, "TCP Connection Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Conexão: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
                    isConnected = false;
                }
            }
        }).start();
    }

    public void setSocket(Socket socket) {
        this.socket = socket;
        try {
            bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
            printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
            isConnected = true;
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conexão Aceita.").sendToTarget();
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connection Accepted.");
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Socket Setup Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro ao configurar Socket: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {
        if (printWriter != null && isConnected) {
            String message = new String(bytes);
            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}

Obrigado pela nova captura de tela. Entendi os novos erros. Os erros "cannot find symbol variable" para elementos como nodeRoleRadioGroup, peerGatewayIpEditText, etc., indicam que o Android Studio não está conseguindo encontrar as referências para esses IDs no seu arquivo de layout (activity_main.xml).
Isso geralmente acontece quando o arquivo activity_main.xml está ausente, incorreto ou não está sendo processado corretamente. Além disso, o erro "no suitable constructor found for TcpSendReceiveThread" e "cannot find symbol method setSocket(Socket)" sugere que as classes P2PSendReceiveThread e TcpSendReceiveThread ainda não estão sendo reconhecidas corretamente ou que as versões que você tem não são as mais recentes.
Para resolver isso, faremos o seguinte:
Vou fornecer o conteúdo completo do arquivo activity_main.xml. Você precisará substituir todo o conteúdo do seu arquivo app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml por este código.
Vou reenviar o conteúdo completo das classes P2PSendReceiveThread.java e TcpSendReceiveThread.java para garantir que você tenha as versões mais recentes e corretas.
Por favor, comece substituindo o conteúdo do seu activity_main.xml.

Após SUBSTITUIR TODO O CONTEÚDO do arquivo app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml por este código, por favor, reenvie o conteúdo completo das classes P2PSendReceiveThread.java e TcpSendReceiveThread.java para garantir que você tenha as versões mais recentes e corretas.
Conteúdo completo para P2PSendReceiveThread.java:
Java
package com.example.meshwave;

import android.os.Handler;
import android.os.Message;
import android.util.Log;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.PrintWriter;
import java.net.Socket;

public class P2PSendReceiveThread extends Thread {

    private static final String TAG = "P2PSendReceiveThread";
    private Handler handler;
    private Socket socket;
    private BufferedReader bufferedReader;
    private PrintWriter printWriter;
    private boolean isConnected = false;

    public P2PSendReceiveThread(Handler handler) {
        this.handler = handler;
    }

    // For client side (initiating connection)
    public void connect(final String peerAddress, final int port) {
        new Thread(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    // Simulate P2P connection for prototype
                    // In a real scenario, this would involve Wi-Fi Direct or Bluetooth LE APIs
                    socket = new Socket(peerAddress, port);
                    bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
                    printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
                    isConnected = true;
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Conectado a: " + peerAddress).sendToTarget();
                    Log.d(TAG, "P2P Connected to: " + peerAddress);

                    String message;
                    while ((message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                        handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                        Log.d(TAG, "P2P Received: " + message);
                    }
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    Log.e(TAG, "P2P Connection Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro de Conexão: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
                    isConnected = false;
                }
            }
        }).start();
    }

    // For server side (accepting connection)
    public void setSocket(Socket socket) {
        this.socket = socket;
        try {
            bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
            printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
            isConnected = true;
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Conexão Aceita.").sendToTarget();
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Connection Accepted.");
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Socket Setup Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro ao configurar Socket: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {
        if (printWriter != null && isConnected) {
            String message = new String(bytes);
            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "P2P Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void disconnect() {
        try {
            if (socket != null) {
                socket.close();
            }
            if (bufferedReader != null) {
                bufferedReader.close();
            }
            if (printWriter != null) {
                printWriter.close();
            }
            isConnected = false;
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Disconnected.");
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Desconectado.").sendToTarget();
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Error during disconnect: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro ao desconectar: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}
Conteúdo completo para TcpSendReceiveThread.java:
Java
package com.example.meshwave;

import android.os.Handler;
import android.util.Log;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.PrintWriter;
import java.net.Socket;

public class TcpSendReceiveThread extends Thread {

    private static final String TAG = "TcpSendReceiveThread";
    private Handler handler;
    private Socket socket;
    private BufferedReader bufferedReader;
    private PrintWriter printWriter;
    private boolean isConnected = false;

    public TcpSendReceiveThread(Handler handler) {
        this.handler = handler;
    }

    public void connect(final String serverAddress, final int port) {
        new Thread(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    socket = new Socket(serverAddress, port);
                    bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
                    printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
                    isConnected = true;
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conectado a: " + serverAddress).sendToTarget();
                    Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connected to: " + serverAddress);

                    String message;
                    while ((message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                        handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                        Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
                    }
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    Log.e(TAG, "TCP Connection Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Conexão: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
                    isConnected = false;
                }
            }
        }).start();
    }

    public void setSocket(Socket socket) {
        this.socket = socket;
        try {
            bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
            printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
            isConnected = true;
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conexão Aceita.").sendToTarget();
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connection Accepted.");
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Socket Setup Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro ao configurar Socket: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {
        if (printWriter != null && isConnected) {
            String message = new String(bytes);
            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}

opção Rebuild não existe
Lite
Mil desculpas pela confusão! Você está absolutamente correto. A opção "Rebuild Project" geralmente está localizada no menu "Build" do Android Studio. Às vezes, a terminologia pode variar ligeiramente ou a interface pode ser um pouco diferente dependendo da versão do Android Studio.
Por favor, tente encontrar a opção "Rebuild Project" seguindo este caminho:
No Android Studio, vá em Build (no menu superior) > Rebuild Project
Se você não encontrar "Rebuild Project" lá, procure por "Make Project" ou "Rebuild Module 'app'". O objetivo é forçar uma recompilação completa do projeto.
Além disso, para garantir que estamos no mesmo ponto e que todos os erros anteriores sejam resolvidos, por favor, confirme que você substituiu TODO o conteúdo dos seguintes arquivos pelos códigos completos que eu forneci nas mensagens anteriores:
app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml
app/src/main/java/com/example/meshwave/MainActivity.java
app/src/main/java/com/example/meshwave/P2PSendReceiveThread.java
app/src/main/java/com/example/meshwave/TcpSendReceiveThread.java
app/src/main/java/com/example/meshwave/WiFiDirectBroadcastReceiver.java (se você precisou criá-lo)
É CRUCIAL que o conteúdo seja totalmente substituído para evitar problemas de código antigo ou duplicado.
Após garantir que todos esses arquivos estão com o conteúdo correto e que você executou a opção de recompilação, siga os passos:
Sincronize o Projeto com os Arquivos Gradle: No Android Studio, vá em File > Sync Project with Gradle Files.
Limpe o Projeto: Vá em Build > Clean Project.
Reconstrua o Projeto: Vá em Build > Rebuild Project (ou a opção equivalente que você encontrar).
Execute o Aplicativo: Conecte um dispositivo Android ou inicie um emulador e execute o aplicativo.
Me informe se a compilação for bem-sucedida e se você conseguir testar a comunicação.

Manus 1.6 Lite
Resource Not Found Error in Android Build Process
Entrar
Lite
Obrigado por me enviar a linha. Isso confirma o problema: o método log ainda está definido como private no seu MainActivity.java.
Para resolver isso de uma vez por todas, é absolutamente crucial que você substitua TODO o conteúdo do seu arquivo MainActivity.java pelo código completo que estou fornecendo abaixo. Preste atenção especial à linha do método log, que agora está public.
Conteúdo completo para MainActivity.java (com o método log como public):
Java
package com.example.meshwave;

import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
import androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity;
import androidx.core.app.ActivityCompat;
import androidx.core.content.ContextCompat;

import android.Manifest;
import android.annotation.SuppressLint;
import android.content.BroadcastReceiver;
import android.content.Context;
import android.content.IntentFilter;
import android.content.pm.PackageManager;
import android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pConfig;
import android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pDevice;
import android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pDeviceList;
import android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pInfo;
import android.net.wifi.p2p.WifiP2pManager;
import android.os.Bundle;
import android.os.Handler;
import android.os.Looper;
import android.os.Message; // Import Message
import android.util.Log; // Import Log
import android.widget.RadioButton;
import android.widget.RadioGroup;
import android.widget.ScrollView;
import android.widget.TextView;
import android.widget.Button;
import android.widget.EditText;
import android.widget.Toast;

import java.io.IOException;
import java.net.InetAddress;
import java.net.InetSocketAddress;
import java.net.ServerSocket;
import java.net.Socket;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;

public class MainActivity extends AppCompatActivity implements WifiP2pManager.ConnectionInfoListener, WifiP2pManager.PeerListListener {

    // UI Elements
    private TextView logTextView;
    private ScrollView logScrollView;
    private RadioGroup nodeRoleRadioGroup;
    private EditText peerGatewayIpEditText;
    private Button setRoleButton;
    private Button discoverPeersButton;
    private EditText recipientIdEditText;
    private EditText messageEditText;
    private Button sendButton;

    // Wi-Fi P2P related
    private WifiP2pManager manager;
    private WifiP2pManager.Channel channel;
    private BroadcastReceiver receiver;
    private IntentFilter intentFilter;
    private List<WifiP2pDevice> peers = new ArrayList<>();

    // Communication Threads
    private P2PSendReceiveThread p2pSendReceiveThread;
    private TcpSendReceiveThread tcpSendReceiveThread;

    // Node Roles
    private enum NodeRole { NODE_A, NODE_X, NODE_Y, NODE_Z, NODE_B }
    private NodeRole currentNodeRole = NodeRole.NODE_A; // Default role

    // Node IDs (for routing simulation)
    private static final String nodeA_ID = "NODE_A";
    private static final String nodeX_ID = "NODE_X";
    private static final String nodeY_ID = "NODE_Y";
    private static final String nodeZ_ID = "NODE_Z";
    private static final String nodeB_ID = "NODE_B";

    // Message types for Handler
    public static final int MESSAGE_READ = 1;
    public static final int MESSAGE_TOAST = 2;

    // Handler for updating UI from communication threads
    private Handler handler = new Handler(Looper.getMainLooper()) {
        @Override
        public void handleMessage(@NonNull Message msg) {
            switch (msg.what) {
                case MESSAGE_READ:
                    byte[] readBuf = (byte[]) msg.obj;
                    String readMessage = new String(readBuf, 0, msg.arg1);
                    log("Received: " + readMessage);
                    break;
                case MESSAGE_TOAST:
                    Toast.makeText(MainActivity.this, msg.obj.toString(), Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show();
                    break;
            }
        }
    };

    @Override
    protected void onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState) {
        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState);
        setContentView(R.layout.activity_main);

        // Initialize UI elements
        logTextView = findViewById(R.id.logTextView);
        logScrollView = findViewById(R.id.logScrollView);
        nodeRoleRadioGroup = findViewById(R.id.nodeRoleRadioGroup);
        peerGatewayIpEditText = findViewById(R.id.peerGatewayIpEditText);
        setRoleButton = findViewById(R.id.setRoleButton);
        discoverPeersButton = findViewById(R.id.discoverPeersButton);
        recipientIdEditText = findViewById(R.id.recipientIdEditText);
        messageEditText = findViewById(R.id.messageEditText);
        sendButton = findViewById(R.id.sendButton);

        // Initialize Wi-Fi P2P
        manager = (WifiP2pManager) getSystemService(Context.WIFI_P2P_SERVICE);
        channel = manager.initialize(this, getMainLooper(), null);
        receiver = new WiFiDirectBroadcastReceiver(manager, channel, this);

        intentFilter = new IntentFilter();
        intentFilter.addAction(WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_STATE_CHANGED_ACTION);
        intentFilter.addAction(WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_PEERS_CHANGED_ACTION);
        intentFilter.addAction(WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_CONNECTION_CHANGED_ACTION);
        intentFilter.addAction(WifiP2pManager.WIFI_P2P_THIS_DEVICE_CHANGED_ACTION);

        // Request permissions
        checkAndRequestPermissions();

        // Set up listeners
        setRoleButton.setOnClickListener(v -> setNodeRole());
        discoverPeersButton.setOnClickListener(v -> discoverPeers());
        sendButton.setOnClickListener(v -> sendMessage());

        // Initialize communication threads (they will be started/connected based on role)
        p2pSendReceiveThread = new P2PSendReceiveThread(handler);
        tcpSendReceiveThread = new TcpSendReceiveThread(handler);

        // Initial log
        log("MeshWave App Started.");
    }

    private void checkAndRequestPermissions() {
        String[] permissions = {
                Manifest.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION,
                Manifest.permission.ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION,
                Manifest.permission.ACCESS_WIFI_STATE,
                Manifest.permission.CHANGE_WIFI_STATE,
                Manifest.permission.INTERNET,
                Manifest.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE,
                Manifest.permission.CHANGE_NETWORK_STATE
        };

        List<String> permissionsToRequest = new ArrayList<>();
        for (String permission : permissions) {
            if (ContextCompat.checkSelfPermission(this, permission) != PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED) {
                permissionsToRequest.add(permission);
            }
        }

        if (!permissionsToRequest.isEmpty()) {
            ActivityCompat.requestPermissions(this, permissionsToRequest.toArray(new String[0]), 1);
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void onRequestPermissionsResult(int requestCode, @NonNull String[] permissions, @NonNull int[] grantResults) {
        super.onRequestPermissionsResult(requestCode, permissions, grantResults);
        if (requestCode == 1) {
            for (int i = 0; i < permissions.length; i++) {
                if (grantResults[i] == PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED) {
                    log(permissions[i] + " granted.");
                } else {
                    log(permissions[i] + " denied.");
                }
            }
        }
    }

    @Override
    protected void onResume() {
        super.onResume();
        registerReceiver(receiver, intentFilter);
    }

    @Override
    protected void onPause() {
        super.onPause();
        unregisterReceiver(receiver);
    }

    private void setNodeRole() {
        int selectedId = nodeRoleRadioGroup.getCheckedRadioButtonId();
        RadioButton selectedRadioButton = findViewById(selectedId);
        if (selectedRadioButton != null) {
            String role = selectedRadioButton.getText().toString();
            switch (role) {
                case "Node A": currentNodeRole = NodeRole.NODE_A; break;
                case "Node X": currentNodeRole = NodeRole.NODE_X; break;
                case "Node Y": currentNodeRole = NodeRole.NODE_Y; break;
                case "Node Z": currentNodeRole = NodeRole.NODE_Z; break;
                case "Node B": currentNodeRole = NodeRole.NODE_B; break;
            }
            log("Node role set to: " + currentNodeRole.name());

            // Start server threads based on role
            if (currentNodeRole == NodeRole.NODE_Y || currentNodeRole == NodeRole.NODE_Z) {
                // These nodes act as gateways, so they should listen for TCP connections
                // For simplicity in prototype, we'll assume a fixed port
                new Thread(() -> {
                    try {
                        ServerSocket serverSocket = new ServerSocket(8888);
                        log("Listening for TCP connections on port 8888...");
                        Socket socket = serverSocket.accept();
                        log("TCP connection established with: " + socket.getInetAddress().getHostAddress());
                        tcpSendReceiveThread.setSocket(socket);
                        tcpSendReceiveThread.start();
                    } catch (IOException e) {
                        log("TCP Server Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    }
                }).start();
            }
        }
    }

    private void discoverPeers() {
        if (manager != null && channel != null) {
            manager.discoverPeers(channel, new WifiP2pManager.ActionListener() {
                @Override
                public void onSuccess() {
                    log("Peer discovery initiated.");
                }

                @Override
                public void onFailure(int reasonCode) {
                    log("Peer discovery failed: " + reasonCode);
                }
            });
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void onPeersAvailable(WifiP2pDeviceList peerList) {
        peers.clear();
        peers.addAll(peerList.getDeviceList());
        log("Peers discovered: " + peers.size());
        for (WifiP2pDevice device : peers) {
            log("  - " + device.deviceName + " (" + device.deviceAddress + ")");
        }

        // For prototype, connect to the first available peer if we are Node A or B
        if ((currentNodeRole == NodeRole.NODE_A || currentNodeRole == NodeRole.NODE_B) && !peers.isEmpty()) {
            WifiP2pDevice device = peers.get(0);
            WifiP2pConfig config = new WifiP2pConfig();
            config.deviceAddress = device.deviceAddress;

            manager.connect(channel, config, new WifiP2pManager.ActionListener() {
                @Override
                public void onSuccess() {
                    log("Connecting to peer: " + device.deviceName);
                }

                @Override
                public void onFailure(int reasonCode) {
                    log("Failed to connect to peer: " + reasonCode);
                }
            });
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void onConnectionInfoAvailable(WifiP2pInfo info) {
        log("Connection info available. Group Formed: " + info.groupFormed);
        if (info.groupFormed) {
            if (info.isGroupOwner) {
                log("I am the Group Owner.");
                // Group owner acts as a server for P2P connections
                new Thread(() -> {
                    try {
                        ServerSocket serverSocket = new ServerSocket(8888);
                        log("Listening for P2P connections on port 8888...");
                        Socket socket = serverSocket.accept();
                        log("P2P connection established with: " + socket.getInetAddress().getHostAddress());
                        p2pSendReceiveThread.setSocket(socket);
                        p2pSendReceiveThread.start();
                    } catch (IOException e) {
                        log("P2P Server Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    }
                }).start();
            } else {
                log("I am a client. Group Owner Address: " + info.groupOwnerAddress.getHostAddress());
                // Client connects to group owner for P2P communication
                p2pSendReceiveThread.connect(info.groupOwnerAddress.getHostAddress(), 8888);
            }
        }
    }

    private void sendMessage() {
        String recipientId = recipientIdEditText.getText().toString().trim();
        String messageContent = messageEditText.getText().toString().trim();

        if (recipientId.isEmpty() || messageContent.isEmpty()) {
            log("Recipient ID and Message cannot be empty.");
            return;
        }

        String fullMessage = getCurrentNodeId() + ":" + recipientId + ":" + messageContent;
        log("Attempting to send: " + fullMessage);

        // Simplified routing logic based on the provided table
        switch (getCurrentNodeId()) {
            case nodeA_ID:
                if (recipientId.equals(nodeY_ID)) {
                    if (p2pSendReceiveThread != null && p2pSendReceiveThread.isConnected()) {
                        p2pSendReceiveThread.send(fullMessage.getBytes());
                    } else {
                        log("P2P connection to Y not established.");
                    }
                } else if (recipientId.equals(nodeZ_ID) || recipientId.equals(nodeB_ID)) {
                    // Route A -> Y (P2P) -> Z (TCP) -> B (P2P)
                    // For prototype, we'll just log the intent to send via Y
                    log("Routing via Y for Z/B. (P2P to Y, then Y to Z/B via TCP/P2P)");
                    if (p2pSendReceiveThread != null && p2pSendReceiveThread.isConnected()) {
                        p2pSendReceiveThread.send(fullMessage.getBytes());
                    } else {
                        log("P2P connection to Y not established for routing.");
                    }
                } else {
                    log("Invalid recipient for Node A.");
                }
                break;
            case nodeX_ID:
                // Node X can only talk to Node Y via P2P in this simplified setup
                if (recipientId.equals(nodeY_ID)) {
                    if (p2pSendReceiveThread != null && p2pSendReceiveThread.isConnected()) {
                        p2pSendReceiveThread.send(fullMessage.getBytes());
                    } else {
                        log("P2P connection to Y not established.");
                    }
                } else {
                    log("Invalid recipient for Node X.");
                }
                break;
            case nodeY_ID:
                if (recipientId.equals(nodeA_ID) || recipientId.equals(nodeX_ID)) {
                    if (p2pSendReceiveThread != null && p2pSendReceiveThread.isConnected()) {
                        p2pSendReceiveThread.send(fullMessage.getBytes());
                    } else {
                        log("P2P connection to A/X not established.");
                    }
                } else if (recipientId.equals(nodeZ_ID) || recipientId.equals(nodeB_ID)) {
                    // Route Y -> Z (TCP)
                    if (tcpSendReceiveThread != null && tcpSendReceiveThread.isConnected()) {
                        tcpSendReceiveThread.send(fullMessage.getBytes());
                    } else {
                        log("TCP connection to Z not established.");
                    }
                } else {
                    log("Invalid recipient for Node Y.");
                }
                break;
            case nodeZ_ID:
                if (recipientId.equals(nodeB_ID)) {
                    if (p2pSendReceiveThread != null && p2pSendReceiveThread.isConnected()) {
                        p2pSendReceiveThread.send(fullMessage.getBytes());
                    } else {
                        log("P2P connection to B not established.");
                    }
                } else if (recipientId.equals(nodeY_ID) || recipientId.equals(nodeA_ID) || recipientId.equals(nodeX_ID)) {
                    // Route Z -> Y (TCP)
                    if (tcpSendReceiveThread != null && tcpSendReceiveThread.isConnected()) {
                        tcpSendReceiveThread.send(fullMessage.getBytes());
                    } else {
                        log("TCP connection to Y not established.");
                    }
                } else {
                    log("Invalid recipient for Node Z.");
                }
                break;
            case nodeB_ID:
                if (recipientId.equals(nodeZ_ID)) {
                    if (p2pSendReceiveThread != null && p2pSendReceiveThread.isConnected()) {
                        p2pSendReceiveThread.send(fullMessage.getBytes());
                    } else {
                        log("P2P connection to Z not established.");
                    }
                } else if (recipientId.equals(nodeY_ID) || recipientId.equals(nodeA_ID) || recipientId.equals(nodeX_ID)) {
                    // Route B -> Z (P2P) -> Y (TCP) -> A/X (P2P)
                    // For prototype, we'll just log the intent to send via Z
                    log("Routing via Z for Y/A/X. (P2P to Z, then Z to Y/A/X via TCP/P2P)");
                    if (p2pSendReceiveThread != null && p2pSendReceiveThread.isConnected()) {
                        p2pSendReceiveThread.send(fullMessage.getBytes());
                    } else {
                        log("P2P connection to Z not established for routing.");
                    }
                } else {
                    log("Invalid recipient for Node B.");
                }
                break;
            default:
                log("Unknown node role.");
                break;
        }
    }

    // --- Utility Method ---
    public void log(String message) { // Changed to public
        runOnUiThread(() -> {
            logTextView.append(message + "\n");
            logScrollView.post(() -> logScrollView.fullScroll(ScrollView.FOCUS_DOWN));
        });
    }

    private String getCurrentNodeId() {
        switch (currentNodeRole) {
            case NODE_A: return nodeA_ID;
            case NODE_X: return nodeX_ID;
            case NODE_Y: return nodeY_ID;
            case NODE_Z: return nodeZ_ID;
            case NODE_B: return nodeB_ID;
            default: return "UNKNOWN";
        }
    }

    @Override
    protected void onDestroy() {
        super.onDestroy();
        // Disconnect P2P and TCP threads if they are running
        if (p2pSendReceiveThread != null) {
            p2pSendReceiveThread.cancel();
        }
        if (tcpSendReceiveThread != null) {
            tcpSendReceiveThread.cancel();
        }
    }
}

Obrigado pela nova captura de tela. Entendi os novos erros. Os erros "cannot find symbol variable" para elementos como nodeRoleRadioGroup, peerGatewayIpEditText, etc., indicam que o Android Studio não está conseguindo encontrar as referências para esses IDs no seu arquivo de layout (activity_main.xml).
Isso geralmente acontece quando o arquivo activity_main.xml está ausente, incorreto ou não está sendo processado corretamente. Além disso, o erro "no suitable constructor found for TcpSendReceiveThread" e "cannot find symbol method setSocket(Socket)" sugere que as classes P2PSendReceiveThread e TcpSendReceiveThread ainda não estão sendo reconhecidas corretamente ou que as versões que você tem não são as mais recentes.
Para resolver isso, faremos o seguinte:
Vou fornecer o conteúdo completo do arquivo activity_main.xml. Você precisará substituir todo o conteúdo do seu arquivo app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml por este código.
Vou reenviar o conteúdo completo das classes P2PSendReceiveThread.java e TcpSendReceiveThread.java para garantir que você tenha as versões mais recentes e corretas.
Por favor, comece substituindo o conteúdo do seu activity_main.xml.
