            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro ao configurar Socket: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {
        if (printWriter != null && isConnected) {
            String message = new String(bytes);
            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "P2P Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void disconnect() {
        try {
            if (socket != null) {
                socket.close();
            }
            if (bufferedReader != null) {
                bufferedReader.close();
            }
            if (printWriter != null) {
                printWriter.close();
            }
            isConnected = false;
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Disconnected.");
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Desconectado.").sendToTarget();
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Error during disconnect: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro ao desconectar: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}

package com.example.meshwave;

import android.os.Handler;
import android.os.Message;
import android.util.Log;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.PrintWriter;
import java.net.Socket;

public class P2PSendReceiveThread extends Thread {

    private static final String TAG = "P2PSendReceiveThread";
    private Handler handler;
    private Socket socket;
    private BufferedReader bufferedReader;
    private PrintWriter printWriter;
    private boolean isConnected = false;

    public P2PSendReceiveThread(Handler handler) {
        this.handler = handler;
    }

    // For client side (initiating connection)
    public void connect(final String peerAddress, final int port) {
        new Thread(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    // Simulate P2P connection for prototype
                    // In a real scenario, this would involve Wi-Fi Direct or Bluetooth LE APIs
                    socket = new Socket(peerAddress, port);
                    bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
                    printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
                    isConnected = true;
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Conectado a: " + peerAddress).sendToTarget();
                    Log.d(TAG, "P2P Connected to: " + peerAddress);

                    String message;
                    while ((message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                        handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                        Log.d(TAG, "P2P Received: " + message);
                    }
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    Log.e(TAG, "P2P Connection Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro de Conexão: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
                    isConnected = false;
                }
            }
        }).start();
    }

    // For server side (accepting connection)
    public void setSocket(Socket socket) {
        this.socket = socket;
        try {
            bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
            printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
            isConnected = true;
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Conexão Aceita.").sendToTarget();
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Connection Accepted.");
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Socket Setup Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro ao configurar Socket: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {
        if (printWriter != null && isConnected) {
            String message = new String(bytes);
            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "P2P Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void disconnect() {
        try {
            if (socket != null) {
                socket.close();
            }
            if (bufferedReader != null) {
                bufferedReader.close();
            }
            if (printWriter != null) {
                printWriter.close();
            }
            isConnected = false;
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Disconnected.");
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Desconectado.").sendToTarget();
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Error during disconnect: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro ao desconectar: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}

package com.example.meshwave;

import android.os.Handler;
import android.os.Message;
import android.util.Log;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.PrintWriter;
import java.net.Socket;

public class P2PSendReceiveThread extends Thread {

    private static final String TAG = "P2PSendReceiveThread";
    private Handler handler;
    private Socket socket;
    private BufferedReader bufferedReader;
    private PrintWriter printWriter;
    private boolean isConnected = false;

    public P2PSendReceiveThread(Handler handler) {
        this.handler = handler;
    }

    // For client side (initiating connection)
    public void connect(final String peerAddress, final int port) {
        new Thread(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    // Simulate P2P connection for prototype
                    // In a real scenario, this would involve Wi-Fi Direct or Bluetooth LE APIs
                    socket = new Socket(peerAddress, port);
                    bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
                    printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
                    isConnected = true;
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Conectado a: " + peerAddress).sendToTarget();
                    Log.d(TAG, "P2P Connected to: " + peerAddress);

                        handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                        Log.d(TAG, "P2P Received: " + message);
                    }

                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro de Conexão: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
                    isConnected = false;
                }
            }
        }).start();
    }

        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {

            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "P2P Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void disconnect() {
        try {
            if (socket != null) {
                socket.close();
            }
            if (bufferedReader != null) {
                bufferedReader.close();
            }
            if (printWriter != null) {
                printWriter.close();
            }
            isConnected = false;
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Disconnected.");
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Desconectado.").sendToTarget();
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Error during disconnect: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro ao desconectar: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}

Conteúdo completo para TcpSendReceiveThread.java:

Conteúdo completo para TcpSendReceiveThread.java:

Conteúdo completo para TcpSendReceiveThread.java:

TcpSendReceiveThread.java

Java
package com.example.meshwave;

import android.os.Handler;
import android.util.Log;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.PrintWriter;
import java.net.Socket;

public class TcpSendReceiveThread extends Thread {

    private static final String TAG = "TcpSendReceiveThread";
    private Handler handler;
    private Socket socket;
    private BufferedReader bufferedReader;
    private PrintWriter printWriter;
    private boolean isConnected = false;

    public TcpSendReceiveThread(Handler handler) {
        this.handler = handler;
    }

    public void connect(final String serverAddress, final int port) {
        new Thread(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    socket = new Socket(serverAddress, port);
                    bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
                    printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
                    isConnected = true;
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conectado a: " + serverAddress).sendToTarget();
                    Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connected to: " + serverAddress);

                    String message;
                    while ((message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                        handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                        Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
                    }
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    Log.e(TAG, "TCP Connection Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Conexão: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
                    isConnected = false;
                }
            }
        }).start();
    }

    public void setSocket(Socket socket) {
        this.socket = socket;
        try {
            bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
            printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
            isConnected = true;
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conexão Aceita.").sendToTarget();
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connection Accepted.");
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Socket Setup Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro ao configurar Socket: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {
        if (printWriter != null && isConnected) {
            String message = new String(bytes);
            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}

Java
package com.example.meshwave;

import android.os.Handler;
import android.util.Log;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.PrintWriter;
import java.net.Socket;

public class TcpSendReceiveThread extends Thread {

    private static final String TAG = "TcpSendReceiveThread";
    private Handler handler;
    private Socket socket;
    private BufferedReader bufferedReader;
    private PrintWriter printWriter;
    private boolean isConnected = false;

    public TcpSendReceiveThread(Handler handler) {
        this.handler = handler;
    }

    public void connect(final String serverAddress, final int port) {
        new Thread(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    socket = new Socket(serverAddress, port);
                    bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
                    printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
                    isConnected = true;
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conectado a: " + serverAddress).sendToTarget();
                    Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connected to: " + serverAddress);

                    String message;
                    while ((message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                        handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                        Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
                    }
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    Log.e(TAG, "TCP Connection Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Conexão: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
                    isConnected = false;
                }
            }
        }).start();
    }

    public void setSocket(Socket socket) {
        this.socket = socket;
        try {
            bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
            printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
            isConnected = true;
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conexão Aceita.").sendToTarget();
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connection Accepted.");
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Socket Setup Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro ao configurar Socket: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {
        if (printWriter != null && isConnected) {
            String message = new String(bytes);
            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}

Java

Java

package com.example.meshwave;

import android.os.Handler;
import android.util.Log;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.PrintWriter;
import java.net.Socket;

public class TcpSendReceiveThread extends Thread {

    private static final String TAG = "TcpSendReceiveThread";
    private Handler handler;
    private Socket socket;
    private BufferedReader bufferedReader;
    private PrintWriter printWriter;
    private boolean isConnected = false;

    public TcpSendReceiveThread(Handler handler) {
        this.handler = handler;
    }

    public void connect(final String serverAddress, final int port) {
        new Thread(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    socket = new Socket(serverAddress, port);
                    bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
                    printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
                    isConnected = true;
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conectado a: " + serverAddress).sendToTarget();
                    Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connected to: " + serverAddress);

                    String message;
                    while ((message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                        handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                        Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
                    }
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    Log.e(TAG, "TCP Connection Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Conexão: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
                    isConnected = false;
                }
            }
        }).start();
    }

    public void setSocket(Socket socket) {
        this.socket = socket;
        try {
            bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
            printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
            isConnected = true;
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conexão Aceita.").sendToTarget();
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connection Accepted.");
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Socket Setup Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro ao configurar Socket: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {
        if (printWriter != null && isConnected) {
            String message = new String(bytes);
            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}

package com.example.meshwave;

import android.os.Handler;
import android.util.Log;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.PrintWriter;
import java.net.Socket;

public class TcpSendReceiveThread extends Thread {

    private static final String TAG = "TcpSendReceiveThread";
    private Handler handler;
    private Socket socket;
    private BufferedReader bufferedReader;
    private PrintWriter printWriter;
    private boolean isConnected = false;

    public TcpSendReceiveThread(Handler handler) {
        this.handler = handler;
    }

    public void connect(final String serverAddress, final int port) {
        new Thread(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    socket = new Socket(serverAddress, port);
                    bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
                    printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
                    isConnected = true;
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conectado a: " + serverAddress).sendToTarget();
                    Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connected to: " + serverAddress);

                    String message;
                    while ((message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                        handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                        Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
                    }
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    Log.e(TAG, "TCP Connection Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Conexão: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
                    isConnected = false;
                }
            }
        }).start();
    }

    public void setSocket(Socket socket) {
        this.socket = socket;
        try {
            bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
            printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
            isConnected = true;
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conexão Aceita.").sendToTarget();
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connection Accepted.");
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Socket Setup Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro ao configurar Socket: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {
        if (printWriter != null && isConnected) {
            String message = new String(bytes);
            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}

package com.example.meshwave;

import android.os.Handler;
import android.util.Log;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.PrintWriter;
import java.net.Socket;

public class TcpSendReceiveThread extends Thread {

    private static final String TAG = "TcpSendReceiveThread";
    private Handler handler;
    private Socket socket;
    private BufferedReader bufferedReader;
    private PrintWriter printWriter;
    private boolean isConnected = false;

    public TcpSendReceiveThread(Handler handler) {
        this.handler = handler;
    }

    public void connect(final String serverAddress, final int port) {
        new Thread(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    socket = new Socket(serverAddress, port);
                    bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
                    printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
                    isConnected = true;
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conectado a: " + serverAddress).sendToTarget();
                    Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connected to: " + serverAddress);

                    String message;
                    while ((message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                        handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                        Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
                    }
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    Log.e(TAG, "TCP Connection Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Conexão: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
                    isConnected = false;
                }
            }
        }).start();
    }

    public void setSocket(Socket socket) {
        this.socket = socket;
        try {
            bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
            printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
            isConnected = true;
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conexão Aceita.").sendToTarget();
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connection Accepted.");
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Socket Setup Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro ao configurar Socket: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {
        if (printWriter != null && isConnected) {
            String message = new String(bytes);
            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}

Lite
Obrigado pela nova captura de tela. Entendi os novos erros. Os erros "cannot find symbol variable" para elementos como nodeRoleRadioGroup, peerGatewayIpEditText, etc., indicam que o Android Studio não está conseguindo encontrar as referências para esses IDs no seu arquivo de layout (activity_main.xml).
Isso geralmente acontece quando o arquivo activity_main.xml está ausente, incorreto ou não está sendo processado corretamente. Além disso, o erro "no suitable constructor found for TcpSendReceiveThread" e "cannot find symbol method setSocket(Socket)" sugere que as classes P2PSendReceiveThread e TcpSendReceiveThread ainda não estão sendo reconhecidas corretamente ou que as versões que você tem não são as mais recentes.
Para resolver isso, faremos o seguinte:
Vou fornecer o conteúdo completo do arquivo activity_main.xml. Você precisará substituir todo o conteúdo do seu arquivo app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml por este código.
Vou reenviar o conteúdo completo das classes P2PSendReceiveThread.java e TcpSendReceiveThread.java para garantir que você tenha as versões mais recentes e corretas.
Por favor, comece substituindo o conteúdo do seu activity_main.xml.
Conteúdo completo para activity_main.xml:

Após SUBSTITUIR TODO O CONTEÚDO do arquivo app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml por este código, por favor, reenvie o conteúdo completo das classes P2PSendReceiveThread.java e TcpSendReceiveThread.java para garantir que você tenha as versões mais recentes e corretas.
Conteúdo completo para P2PSendReceiveThread.java:
Java
package com.example.meshwave;

import android.os.Handler;
import android.os.Message;
import android.util.Log;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.PrintWriter;
import java.net.Socket;

public class P2PSendReceiveThread extends Thread {

    private static final String TAG = "P2PSendReceiveThread";
    private Handler handler;
    private Socket socket;
    private BufferedReader bufferedReader;
    private PrintWriter printWriter;
    private boolean isConnected = false;

    public P2PSendReceiveThread(Handler handler) {
        this.handler = handler;
    }

    // For client side (initiating connection)
    public void connect(final String peerAddress, final int port) {
        new Thread(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    // Simulate P2P connection for prototype
                    // In a real scenario, this would involve Wi-Fi Direct or Bluetooth LE APIs
                    socket = new Socket(peerAddress, port);
                    bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
                    printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
                    isConnected = true;
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Conectado a: " + peerAddress).sendToTarget();
                    Log.d(TAG, "P2P Connected to: " + peerAddress);

                    String message;
                    while ((message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                        handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                        Log.d(TAG, "P2P Received: " + message);
                    }
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    Log.e(TAG, "P2P Connection Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro de Conexão: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
                    isConnected = false;
                }
            }
        }).start();
    }

    // For server side (accepting connection)
    public void setSocket(Socket socket) {
        this.socket = socket;
        try {
            bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
            printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
            isConnected = true;
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Conexão Aceita.").sendToTarget();
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Connection Accepted.");
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Socket Setup Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro ao configurar Socket: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {
        if (printWriter != null && isConnected) {
            String message = new String(bytes);
            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "P2P Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void disconnect() {
        try {
            if (socket != null) {
                socket.close();
            }
            if (bufferedReader != null) {
                bufferedReader.close();
            }
            if (printWriter != null) {
                printWriter.close();
            }
            isConnected = false;
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Disconnected.");
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Desconectado.").sendToTarget();
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Error during disconnect: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro ao desconectar: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}
Conteúdo completo para TcpSendReceiveThread.java:
Java
package com.example.meshwave;

import android.os.Handler;
import android.util.Log;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.PrintWriter;
import java.net.Socket;

public class TcpSendReceiveThread extends Thread {

    private static final String TAG = "TcpSendReceiveThread";
    private Handler handler;
    private Socket socket;
    private BufferedReader bufferedReader;
    private PrintWriter printWriter;
    private boolean isConnected = false;

    public TcpSendReceiveThread(Handler handler) {
        this.handler = handler;
    }

    public void connect(final String serverAddress, final int port) {
        new Thread(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    socket = new Socket(serverAddress, port);
                    bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
                    printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
                    isConnected = true;
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conectado a: " + serverAddress).sendToTarget();
                    Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connected to: " + serverAddress);

                    String message;
                    while ((message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                        handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                        Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
                    }
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    Log.e(TAG, "TCP Connection Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Conexão: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
                    isConnected = false;
                }
            }
        }).start();
    }

    public void setSocket(Socket socket) {
        this.socket = socket;
        try {
            bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
            printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
            isConnected = true;
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conexão Aceita.").sendToTarget();
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connection Accepted.");
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Socket Setup Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro ao configurar Socket: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {
        if (printWriter != null && isConnected) {
            String message = new String(bytes);
            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}

Os erros "cannot find symbol variable" para elementos como nodeRoleRadioGroup, peerGatewayIpEditText, etc., indicam que o Android Studio não está conseguindo encontrar as referências para esses IDs no seu arquivo de layout (activity_main.xml).
Isso geralmente acontece quando o arquivo activity_main.xml está ausente, incorreto ou não está sendo processado corretamente. Além disso, o erro "no suitable constructor found for TcpSendReceiveThread" e "cannot find symbol method setSocket(Socket)" sugere que as classes P2PSendReceiveThread e TcpSendReceiveThread ainda não estão sendo reconhecidas corretamente ou que as versões que você tem não são as mais recentes.

Após SUBSTITUIR TODO O CONTEÚDO do arquivo app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml por este código, por favor, reenvie o conteúdo completo das classes P2PSendReceiveThread.java e TcpSendReceiveThread.java para garantir que você tenha as versões mais recentes e corretas.
Conteúdo completo para P2PSendReceiveThread.java:
Java
package com.example.meshwave;

import android.os.Handler;
import android.os.Message;
import android.util.Log;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.PrintWriter;
import java.net.Socket;

public class P2PSendReceiveThread extends Thread {

    private static final String TAG = "P2PSendReceiveThread";
    private Handler handler;
    private Socket socket;
    private BufferedReader bufferedReader;
    private PrintWriter printWriter;
    private boolean isConnected = false;

    public P2PSendReceiveThread(Handler handler) {
        this.handler = handler;
    }

    // For client side (initiating connection)
    public void connect(final String peerAddress, final int port) {
        new Thread(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    // Simulate P2P connection for prototype
                    // In a real scenario, this would involve Wi-Fi Direct or Bluetooth LE APIs
                    socket = new Socket(peerAddress, port);
                    bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
                    printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
                    isConnected = true;
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Conectado a: " + peerAddress).sendToTarget();
                    Log.d(TAG, "P2P Connected to: " + peerAddress);

                    String message;
                    while ((message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                        handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                        Log.d(TAG, "P2P Received: " + message);
                    }
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    Log.e(TAG, "P2P Connection Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro de Conexão: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
                    isConnected = false;
                }
            }
        }).start();
    }

    // For server side (accepting connection)
    public void setSocket(Socket socket) {
        this.socket = socket;
        try {
            bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
            printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
            isConnected = true;
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Conexão Aceita.").sendToTarget();
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Connection Accepted.");
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Socket Setup Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro ao configurar Socket: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {
        if (printWriter != null && isConnected) {
            String message = new String(bytes);
            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "P2P Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void disconnect() {
        try {
            if (socket != null) {
                socket.close();
            }
            if (bufferedReader != null) {
                bufferedReader.close();
            }
            if (printWriter != null) {
                printWriter.close();
            }
            isConnected = false;
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Disconnected.");
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Desconectado.").sendToTarget();
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Error during disconnect: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro ao desconectar: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}
Conteúdo completo para TcpSendReceiveThread.java:
Java
package com.example.meshwave;

import android.os.Handler;
import android.util.Log;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.PrintWriter;
import java.net.Socket;

public class TcpSendReceiveThread extends Thread {

    private static final String TAG = "TcpSendReceiveThread";
    private Handler handler;
    private Socket socket;
    private BufferedReader bufferedReader;
    private PrintWriter printWriter;
    private boolean isConnected = false;

    public TcpSendReceiveThread(Handler handler) {
        this.handler = handler;
    }

    public void connect(final String serverAddress, final int port) {
        new Thread(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    socket = new Socket(serverAddress, port);
                    bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
                    printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
                    isConnected = true;
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conectado a: " + serverAddress).sendToTarget();
                    Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connected to: " + serverAddress);

                    String message;
                    while ((message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                        handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                        Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
                    }
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    Log.e(TAG, "TCP Connection Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Conexão: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
                    isConnected = false;
                }
            }
        }).start();
    }

    public void setSocket(Socket socket) {
        this.socket = socket;
        try {
            bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
            printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
            isConnected = true;
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conexão Aceita.").sendToTarget();
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connection Accepted.");
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Socket Setup Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro ao configurar Socket: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {
        if (printWriter != null && isConnected) {
            String message = new String(bytes);
            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}

import android.os.Handler;
import android.os.Message;
import android.util.Log;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.PrintWriter;
import java.net.Socket;

public class P2PSendReceiveThread extends Thread {

    private static final String TAG = "P2PSendReceiveThread";
    private Handler handler;
    private Socket socket;
    private BufferedReader bufferedReader;
    private PrintWriter printWriter;
    private boolean isConnected = false;

    public P2PSendReceiveThread(Handler handler) {
        this.handler = handler;
    }

    // For client side (initiating connection)
    public void connect(final String peerAddress, final int port) {
        new Thread(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    // Simulate P2P connection for prototype
                    // In a real scenario, this would involve Wi-Fi Direct or Bluetooth LE APIs
                    socket = new Socket(peerAddress, port);
                    bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
                    printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
                    isConnected = true;
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Conectado a: " + peerAddress).sendToTarget();
                    Log.d(TAG, "P2P Connected to: " + peerAddress);

                    String message;
                    while ((message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                        handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                        Log.d(TAG, "P2P Received: " + message);
                    }
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    Log.e(TAG, "P2P Connection Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro de Conexão: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
                    isConnected = false;
                }
            }
        }).start();
    }

    // For server side (accepting connection)
    public void setSocket(Socket socket) {
        this.socket = socket;
        try {
            bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
            printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
            isConnected = true;
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Conexão Aceita.").sendToTarget();
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Connection Accepted.");
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Socket Setup Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro ao configurar Socket: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {
        if (printWriter != null && isConnected) {
            String message = new String(bytes);
            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "P2P Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void disconnect() {
        try {
            if (socket != null) {
                socket.close();
            }
            if (bufferedReader != null) {
                bufferedReader.close();
            }
            if (printWriter != null) {
                printWriter.close();
            }
            isConnected = false;
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Disconnected.");
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Desconectado.").sendToTarget();
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Error during disconnect: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro ao desconectar: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}
Conteúdo completo para TcpSendReceiveThread.java:
Java
package com.example.meshwave;

import android.os.Handler;
import android.util.Log;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.PrintWriter;
import java.net.Socket;

public class TcpSendReceiveThread extends Thread {

    private static final String TAG = "TcpSendReceiveThread";
    private Handler handler;
    private Socket socket;
    private BufferedReader bufferedReader;
    private PrintWriter printWriter;
    private boolean isConnected = false;

    public TcpSendReceiveThread(Handler handler) {
        this.handler = handler;
    }

    public void connect(final String serverAddress, final int port) {
        new Thread(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    socket = new Socket(serverAddress, port);
                    bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
                    printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
                    isConnected = true;
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conectado a: " + serverAddress).sendToTarget();
                    Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connected to: " + serverAddress);

                    String message;
                    while ((message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                        handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                        Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
                    }
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    Log.e(TAG, "TCP Connection Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Conexão: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
                    isConnected = false;
                }
            }
        }).start();
    }

    public void setSocket(Socket socket) {
        this.socket = socket;
        try {
            bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
            printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
            isConnected = true;
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conexão Aceita.").sendToTarget();
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connection Accepted.");
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Socket Setup Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro ao configurar Socket: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {
        if (printWriter != null && isConnected) {
            String message = new String(bytes);
            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}

Execute o Aplicativo: Conecte um dispositivo Android ou inicie um emulador e execute o aplicativo.

Obrigado pela nova captura de tela. Entendi os novos erros. Os erros "cannot find symbol variable" para elementos como nodeRoleRadioGroup, peerGatewayIpEditText, etc., indicam que o Android Studio não está conseguindo encontrar as referências para esses IDs no seu arquivo de layout (activity_main.xml).
Isso geralmente acontece quando o arquivo activity_main.xml está ausente, incorreto ou não está sendo processado corretamente. Além disso, o erro "no suitable constructor found for TcpSendReceiveThread" e "cannot find symbol method setSocket(Socket)" sugere que as classes P2PSendReceiveThread e TcpSendReceiveThread ainda não estão sendo reconhecidas corretamente ou que as versões que você tem não são as mais recentes.
Para resolver isso, faremos o seguinte:
Vou fornecer o conteúdo completo do arquivo activity_main.xml. Você precisará substituir todo o conteúdo do seu arquivo app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml por este código.
Vou reenviar o conteúdo completo das classes P2PSendReceiveThread.java e TcpSendReceiveThread.java para garantir que você tenha as versões mais recentes e corretas.
Por favor, comece substituindo o conteúdo do seu activity_main.xml.

Após SUBSTITUIR TODO O CONTEÚDO do arquivo app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml por este código, por favor, reenvie o conteúdo completo das classes P2PSendReceiveThread.java e TcpSendReceiveThread.java para garantir que você tenha as versões mais recentes e corretas.
Conteúdo completo para P2PSendReceiveThread.java:
Java
package com.example.meshwave;

import android.os.Handler;
import android.os.Message;
import android.util.Log;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.PrintWriter;
import java.net.Socket;

public class P2PSendReceiveThread extends Thread {

    private static final String TAG = "P2PSendReceiveThread";
    private Handler handler;
    private Socket socket;
    private BufferedReader bufferedReader;
    private PrintWriter printWriter;
    private boolean isConnected = false;

    public P2PSendReceiveThread(Handler handler) {
        this.handler = handler;
    }

    // For client side (initiating connection)
    public void connect(final String peerAddress, final int port) {
        new Thread(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    // Simulate P2P connection for prototype
                    // In a real scenario, this would involve Wi-Fi Direct or Bluetooth LE APIs
                    socket = new Socket(peerAddress, port);
                    bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
                    printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
                    isConnected = true;
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Conectado a: " + peerAddress).sendToTarget();
                    Log.d(TAG, "P2P Connected to: " + peerAddress);

                    String message;
                    while ((message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                        handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                        Log.d(TAG, "P2P Received: " + message);
                    }
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    Log.e(TAG, "P2P Connection Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro de Conexão: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
                    isConnected = false;
                }
            }
        }).start();
    }

    // For server side (accepting connection)
    public void setSocket(Socket socket) {
        this.socket = socket;
        try {
            bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
            printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
            isConnected = true;
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Conexão Aceita.").sendToTarget();
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Connection Accepted.");
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Socket Setup Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro ao configurar Socket: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {
        if (printWriter != null && isConnected) {
            String message = new String(bytes);
            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "P2P Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void disconnect() {
        try {
            if (socket != null) {
                socket.close();
            }
            if (bufferedReader != null) {
                bufferedReader.close();
            }
            if (printWriter != null) {
                printWriter.close();
            }
            isConnected = false;
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Disconnected.");
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Desconectado.").sendToTarget();
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Error during disconnect: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro ao desconectar: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}
Conteúdo completo para TcpSendReceiveThread.java:

package com.example.meshwave;

import android.os.Handler;
import android.util.Log;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.PrintWriter;
import java.net.Socket;

public class TcpSendReceiveThread extends Thread {

    private static final String TAG = "TcpSendReceiveThread";
    private Handler handler;
    private Socket socket;
    private BufferedReader bufferedReader;
    private PrintWriter printWriter;
    private boolean isConnected = false;

    public TcpSendReceiveThread(Handler handler) {
        this.handler = handler;
    }

    public void connect(final String serverAddress, final int port) {
        new Thread(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    socket = new Socket(serverAddress, port);
                    bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
                    printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
                    isConnected = true;
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conectado a: " + serverAddress).sendToTarget();
                    Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connected to: " + serverAddress);

                    String message;
                    while ((message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                        handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                        Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
                    }
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    Log.e(TAG, "TCP Connection Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Conexão: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
                    isConnected = false;
                }
            }
        }).start();
    }

    public void setSocket(Socket socket) {
        this.socket = socket;
        try {
            bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
            printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
            isConnected = true;
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Conexão Aceita.").sendToTarget();
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Connection Accepted.");
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Socket Setup Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro ao configurar Socket: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {
        if (printWriter != null && isConnected) {
            String message = new String(bytes);
            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "TCP Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "TCP Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "TCP Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "TCP Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}

app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml

reenvie o conteúdo completo das classes P2PSendReceiveThread.java e TcpSendReceiveThread.java

P2PSendReceiveThread.java

TcpSendReceiveThread.java

P2PSendReceiveThread.java

Java
package com.example.meshwave;

import android.os.Handler;
import android.os.Message;
import android.util.Log;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.PrintWriter;
import java.net.Socket;

public class P2PSendReceiveThread extends Thread {

    private static final String TAG = "P2PSendReceiveThread";
    private Handler handler;
    private Socket socket;
    private BufferedReader bufferedReader;
    private PrintWriter printWriter;
    private boolean isConnected = false;

    public P2PSendReceiveThread(Handler handler) {
        this.handler = handler;
    }

    // For client side (initiating connection)
    public void connect(final String peerAddress, final int port) {
        new Thread(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    // Simulate P2P connection for prototype
                    // In a real scenario, this would involve Wi-Fi Direct or Bluetooth LE APIs
                    socket = new Socket(peerAddress, port);
                    bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
                    printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
                    isConnected = true;
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Conectado a: " + peerAddress).sendToTarget();
                    Log.d(TAG, "P2P Connected to: " + peerAddress);

                    String message;
                    while ((message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                        handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                        Log.d(TAG, "P2P Received: " + message);
                    }
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    Log.e(TAG, "P2P Connection Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro de Conexão: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
                    isConnected = false;
                }
            }
        }).start();
    }

    // For server side (accepting connection)
    public void setSocket(Socket socket) {
        this.socket = socket;
        try {
            bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
            printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
            isConnected = true;
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Conexão Aceita.").sendToTarget();
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Connection Accepted.");
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Socket Setup Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro ao configurar Socket: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {
        if (printWriter != null && isConnected) {
            String message = new String(bytes);
            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "P2P Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void disconnect() {
        try {
            if (socket != null) {
                socket.close();
            }
            if (bufferedReader != null) {
                bufferedReader.close();
            }
            if (printWriter != null) {
                printWriter.close();
            }
            isConnected = false;
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Disconnected.");
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Desconectado.").sendToTarget();
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Error during disconnect: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro ao desconectar: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}

package com.example.meshwave;

import android.os.Handler;
import android.os.Message;
import android.util.Log;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.PrintWriter;
import java.net.Socket;

public class P2PSendReceiveThread extends Thread {

    private static final String TAG = "P2PSendReceiveThread";
    private Handler handler;
    private Socket socket;
    private BufferedReader bufferedReader;
    private PrintWriter printWriter;
    private boolean isConnected = false;

    public P2PSendReceiveThread(Handler handler) {
        this.handler = handler;
    }

    // For client side (initiating connection)
    public void connect(final String peerAddress, final int port) {
        new Thread(new Runnable() {
            @Override
            public void run() {
                try {
                    // Simulate P2P connection for prototype
                    // In a real scenario, this would involve Wi-Fi Direct or Bluetooth LE APIs
                    socket = new Socket(peerAddress, port);
                    bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
                    printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
                    isConnected = true;
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Conectado a: " + peerAddress).sendToTarget();
                    Log.d(TAG, "P2P Connected to: " + peerAddress);

                    String message;
                    while ((message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                        handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                        Log.d(TAG, "P2P Received: " + message);
                    }
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    Log.e(TAG, "P2P Connection Error: " + e.getMessage());
                    handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro de Conexão: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
                    isConnected = false;
                }
            }
        }).start();
    }

    // For server side (accepting connection)
    public void setSocket(Socket socket) {
        this.socket = socket;

            bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(socket.getInputStream()));
            printWriter = new PrintWriter(socket.getOutputStream(), true);
            isConnected = true;
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Conexão Aceita.").sendToTarget();
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Connection Accepted.");
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Socket Setup Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro ao configurar Socket: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void send(byte[] bytes) {
        if (printWriter != null && isConnected) {
            String message = new String(bytes);
            printWriter.println(message);
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Sent: " + message);
        } else {
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Não conectado para enviar mensagem.").sendToTarget();
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Not connected to send message.");
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            String message;
            while (isConnected && (message = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_READ, message.getBytes().length, -1, message.getBytes()).sendToTarget();
                Log.d(TAG, "P2P Received: " + message);
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Read Error: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro de Leitura: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
            isConnected = false;
        }
    }

    public void disconnect() {
        try {
            if (socket != null) {
                socket.close();
            }
            if (bufferedReader != null) {
                bufferedReader.close();
            }
            if (printWriter != null) {
                printWriter.close();
            }
            isConnected = false;
            Log.d(TAG, "P2P Disconnected.");
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Desconectado.").sendToTarget();
        } catch (IOException e) {
            Log.e(TAG, "P2P Error during disconnect: " + e.getMessage());
            handler.obtainMessage(MainActivity.MESSAGE_TOAST, "P2P Erro ao desconectar: " + e.getMessage()).sendToTarget();
        }
    }

    public void cancel() {
        disconnect();
    }

    public boolean isConnected() {
        return isConnected;
    }
}
